title: Simply Gems - White Diamond
description: Adds White Diamond, Ore, Tools & Armor to your minecraft experience!
body:
![Brief Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c46a0c999da24b584e8a7848a2c69ea318700e3.png)

Simple Gems - White Diamond
Adds White Diamond, Ore, Armor & Tools to your world. 
Ore: 
Hardness - 10 
Resistance - 20
Tool needed to collect - Diamond pickaxe or better.
Found on Y levels: -36 to 6

5 - new tools!
1 - new armor set!
2 ore types! - white diamond 0-6 and -36 to -1

Rarity: should be scarce.

1.0.0 Copy was not in solid state! 
Update 1.0.1 released: Armor rating increased and fixed to be stonger than diamond. 
Enjoy.
